title: WorkerMessage
description: Closed envelope for every `postMessage` between the main thread and the AI bot Web Worker (`tasks/mvp/10-heuristic-ai/06-run-ai-in-web-worker.md`). Both ends `Zod.parse` against this schema before dispatch; the inner `payload.command` is additionally validated against `command.schema.json` before the reducer is invoked. Mismatched `version` drops the message and emits `SecurityEvent { kind: 'worker_message_invalid' }`.

kind.description: Closed message kinds. `COMPUTE_MOVE` is main → worker; `MOVE_RESULT` is worker → main; `ABORT` cancels an in-flight computation; `PING` / `PONG` is a liveness check; `AI_ERROR` is the worker → main error path per `docs/architecture/ai-contract.md` § 3; `AI_TRACE_REQUEST` and `AI_TRACE_RESULT` are dev-only tokens gated behind the AI inspector overlay build flag (`tasks/mvp/10-heuristic-ai/08-ai-inspector-dev-screen.md`) and MUST NOT be emitted in production builds.

version.description: Envelope version. Pinned at 1 today; incrementing this value invalidates every older worker bundle and forces a reload via the `version_mismatch` SecurityEvent path.

correlationId.description: UUID v4 minted on the `COMPUTE_MOVE` and echoed by `MOVE_RESULT`. Used for log correlation and to drop late results from a cancelled computation.

stateView.description: AdventureState projection per `docs/architecture/ai-contract.md`. The reducer view is opaque to the worker; the schema does not pin its shape. The main thread MUST validate against the canonical adventure-state contract before posting.

command.description: Command record. Validated against `command.schema.json` before reducer dispatch; this layer only confirms the envelope shape.

requestId.description: Echoes the `correlationId` of the failing request. Used by the dispatcher to fall back per `docs/architecture/ai-contract.md` § 4.

reason.description: Short failure reason. Sanitized for log surfaces; no caller-controlled bytes.

code.description: Optional machine-readable error code; consumers MAY route on this without parsing `reason`.

details.description: Optional structured details bag; opaque to the dispatcher.

requestId.description: Trace-request correlation id, scoped to the dev-only AI inspector overlay per `docs/architecture/ai-contract.md` § 7.

verbosity.description: Optional trace verbosity hint. Dev-only token.

AiTraceRequestPayload.description: Dev-only message gated behind the AI inspector overlay build flag. MUST NOT be emitted in production builds.

command.description: Chosen Command record. Validated against `command.schema.json` separately at the dispatcher.

reasoning.description: Free-form reasoning string consumed by the dev-only inspector screen.

AiTraceResultPayload.description: Dev-only message gated behind the AI inspector overlay build flag. MUST NOT be emitted in production builds.
